scripts.build: npm run build:examples && tsc -b packages/core packages/profile-schema packages/language-typescript packages/discovery packages/provider packages/orchestrator apps/cli apps/server
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.clean: tsc -b packages/core packages/profile-schema packages/language-typescript packages/discovery packages/provider packages/orchestrator apps/cli apps/server --clean
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test --workspace @codexa/profile-schema && npm run test --workspace @codexa/language-typescript && npm run test --workspace @codexa/discovery && npm run test --workspace @codexa/provider && npm run test --workspace @codexa/orchestrator && npm run test --workspace @codexa/cli && npm run test --workspace @codexa/server
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/core packages/profile-schema packages/language-typescript packages/discovery packages/provider packages/orchestrator apps/cli apps/server --pretty false
